---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

::: {.banner-image}
![](banner.png){width=100%}
:::

::: {.contact-section}
# Get in touch

::: {.contact-item}
### 📧 Academic Email
[angela.lulle@unamur.be](mailto:angela.lulle@unamur.be)
:::

::: {.contact-item}
### 📧 Personal Email
[angela@luelle.me](mailto:angela@luelle.me)
:::

::: {.contact-item}
### 📍 Address
Faculty of Economics, Social Sciences and Business Administration  
Rempart de la Vierge, 8  
5000 Namur, Belgium

<iframe src="https://www.google.com/maps/embed?pb=!1m18!1m12!1m3!1d5079.309392594332!2d4.854572412233743!3d50.4661544714767!2m3!1f0!2f0!3f0!3m2!1i1024!2i768!4f13.1!3m3!1m2!1s0x47c199657b08425b%3A0x8e02aeee00d09da8!2sRem%20de%20la%20Vierge%208%2C%205000%20Namur!5e0!3m2!1sen!2sbe!4v1776098545103!5m2!1sen!2sbe" width="400" height="300" style="border:0;" allowfullscreen="" loading="lazy" referrerpolicy="no-referrer-when-downgrade">
</iframe>

:::

:::
